busabase._note: Follow-up fields (contact_id, deal_id, channel_id, channel_type, reason, status, suggested_reply, ref, risk) map to a Busabase record commit's fields. Agent-prepared follow-ups become change requests; approve->review, edits->operation revisions, hand-off/send->merge. Env overrides: KELLY_CRM_BUSABASE_URL / KELLY_CRM_BUSABASE_BASE_ID / KELLY_CRM_BUSABASE_API_KEY. The open-source single-tenant apps/busabase needs no api key; only busabase-cloud does.
